steps.t: The Morgulduin River runs through Rath Dúath. You should find tributaries into the Morgulduin and sample the water there.
The Morgulduin River runs through Rath Dúath. You should sample the water of the Morgulduin, further upstream, past its tributaries.
Rauniel can be found by the banks of the Morgulduin in northern Rath Dúath. You should speak to the mysterious woman.
